payload.answer: The new fact conflicts with the existing current fact because it says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, while the existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to accept the new transition as replacing the current Goldman employment; keep_both to store both facts if the situation is ambiguous or context-dependent; reject_new to leave the existing Goldman employment fact unchanged and not store the new claim; edit to clarify or correct the new memory before deciding.

entity_resolution.reason: Both facts refer to Sam and Goldman, so the new fact appears to describe an employment transition involving the same person and prior employer, but no durable update should be committed without an explicit safe action.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

details: Explained only the backend-supplied safe actions.
Did not commit the new fact as durable memory.
Preserved the conflict between current employment at Goldman and the reported transition to Point72.
